_comment: Comment-free path map for the design-sync esbuild bundle. (1) The real tsconfig.app.json carries block comments AND an at-slash-star glob whose literal slash-star collides with the converter comment-stripper, so it cannot be parsed. (2) The converter path plugin returns a directory for barrel imports instead of its index, so every directory-barrel needs an explicit index entry. (3) The at-slash-infrastructure-api boundary is redirected to inert stubs because the real apiService reads import.meta.env at module scope (fatal in an IIFE) and opens backend side effects previews never need. baseUrl dot-dot resolves the at-slash alias to repo-root src. Specific entries MUST precede the at-slash-star wildcard.
